task_completion.description: Verify the 'Dissertation Notes' collection is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left pane of Zotero, a collection named 'Dissertation Notes' should be visible and selected.

task_completion.description: Verify two standalone notes are created in the collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the middle pane of Zotero, there should be two items with the standalone note icon (a yellow square with horizontal lines), not nested under any parent document.

task_completion.description: Verify Note 1 contains the required phrase and keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right pane (note editor), the text of one of the notes must include the exact phrase 'Research Questions' and the keywords 'transformer', 'attention', and 'scalability'.

task_completion.description: Verify Note 1 is at least 100 characters long.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in Note 1 should be visibly long enough to be at least 100 characters (approximately 15-20 words or a couple of sentences).

task_completion.description: Verify Note 2 contains the required phrase and keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right pane (note editor), the text of the other note must include the exact phrase 'Key Findings' and the keywords 'pre-training' (or 'pretraining'), 'fine-tuning' (or 'finetuning'), and 'benchmark'.

task_completion.description: Verify Note 2 is at least 100 characters long.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in Note 2 should be visibly long enough to be at least 100 characters (approximately 15-20 words or a couple of sentences).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Zotero GUI to create the notes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Zotero application interface (clicking buttons, typing in the note editor) rather than using terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the notes are actually inside Zotero.
integrity.visual_evidence: The note content must be visible inside the Zotero right-hand pane note editor, not in a separate text editor like gedit or nano.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not directly modify the SQLite database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing sqlite3 commands or scripts modifying 'zotero.sqlite'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Application: Zotero 7. Target Collection: 'Dissertation Notes'. Note 1 must contain the phrase 'Research Questions' and keywords 'transformer', 'attention', 'scalability'. Note 2 must contain the phrase 'Key Findings' and keywords 'pre-training' (or 'pretraining'), 'fine-tuning' (or 'finetuning'), 'benchmark'. Both notes must be standalone (itemTypeID=28, represented by a yellow note icon not attached to a parent item) and at least 100 characters long.
